name: Whisspra: Secure Anonymous Chat
description:
A landing page for Whisspra, a secure, next-generation chat platform supporting anonymous messaging, whistleblower mode, and creator monetization.
Whisspra: Full Project Instruction for Google Gemini

Objective: Build a secure, next-generation chat platform called Whisspra using full-stack technologies (React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and Socket.IO). The platform must support anonymous login, real-time encrypted messaging, whistleblower mode, creator monetization, and a modern admin dashboard.

INSTRUCTION TO GOOGLE GEMINI:

You are an expert full-stack AI developer. Help me build a secure chat platform called Whisspra. Follow these phased instructions. You will build a complete frontend and backend system. Work module-by-module. keep working to deliver a wonderful project,Don't stop coding to wait for my instruction, just keep working.

Once the interphase and system components are built, implement a live testing environment to validate the full functionality of each module. This should include:

✅ LIVE TESTING INSTRUCTIONS:

Set up a local development environment using:

npm run dev for frontend

nodemon server.js or node server.js for backend

Implement test accounts:

Anonymous login

Creator account

Admin account

Test the following in real time:

Sending/receiving messages (Socket.IO)

Self-destruct messages

Typing indicators and presence

Whistleblower mode activation

Creator tip transactions

Admin dashboard analytics

Use Postman or Thunder Client to test all backend endpoints:

Auth: /register, /login, /me

Chat: /send, /get/:chatId

Creator: /tips, /earnings

Admin: /users, /reports

Implement real-time logging and debug console to track:

Message delivery status

Server errors

Authentication validation

Include unit and integration tests for critical modules:

Auth flow (JWT tokens, expiry)

Messaging engine

Creator transactions

✅ PHASE 1: Project Setup

Step 1: Initialize backend with the following stack:

Node.js

Express

MongoDB (via Mongoose)

JWT authentication

Folder structure:

/whisspra-backend/
  |-- server.js
  |-- /routes/
  |-- /controllers/
  |-- /models/
  |-- /middleware/
  |-- /config/

Step 2: Initialize frontend with:

React + Vite

Tailwind CSS

React Router DOM

Folder structure:

/whisspra-frontend/
  |-- /src/
       |-- /pages/
       |-- /components/
       |-- /layouts/
       |-- /context/
       |-- /utils/

✅ PHASE 2: Authentication

Implement JWT-based user authentication

Routes:

POST /api/auth/register

POST /api/auth/login

GET /api/auth/me

Support anonymous login (assign UUID without personal info)

Enable logout and token expiry

✅ PHASE 3: Messaging (Socket.IO)

Implement real-time 1-on-1 messaging

Add support for:

Typing indicator

Online status

Message timestamp

Use Socket.IO for live updates

Save messages in MongoDB

✅ PHASE 4: Group Chat

Group chat creation (title, description)

Roles: Admin, Member, Ghost

Add members, remove members

Self-destructing messages (optional timer)

✅ PHASE 5: Whistleblower Mode

Activate from settings or secret code (e.g., 333#)

App disguise interface (e.g., calculator UI)

Emergency wipe shortcut

No trace in browser history or localStorage

✅ PHASE 6: Creator Monetization

Add creator profile page

Stripe/PayPal integration for tips

Follower-only rooms or chats

View transaction history (dashboard)

✅ PHASE 7: Admin Dashboard

User analytics (total users, active chats)

Flagged content reports

Role manager: promote/demote users

Toggle features per user (chat ban, ghost mode, etc.)

✅ PHASE 8: Frontend UI Pages

Landing Page (brand: Whisspra)

Login/Register/Anonymous Entry

Main Chat Interface

Whistleblower Mode UI

Creator Profile + Tip Jar

Admin Dashboard (Charts, Lists)

✅ PHASE 9: AI Integrations

Use OpenAI Whisper for voice-to-text

Add Gemini or GPT-4o for:

Auto-reply suggestions

Summarize long chats

Caption generator for creators

✅ PHASE 10: Finalization

Mobile responsiveness

Dark mode toggle

Admin control panel

Panic lock feature

Deploy frontend to Netlify or Vercel

Deploy backend to Render or Railway

✅ PHASE 11: Notifications & Real-Time Presence

In-app notification system with badges

Real-time alerts for:

New messages

Mentions in groups

Payment received

Toast system for confirmations

"Last seen" and presence indicators

✅ PHASE 12: Settings & Preferences Panel

Update email, password, profile image

Enable/disable:

Self-destruct messages

Notifications

Dark mode

Language selector (multi-language support)

Delete account (with 2-step confirmation)

✅ PHASE 13: Chat Media & File Sharing

Allow users to send:

Images

Audio (voice notes)

PDFs and documents

Use cloud storage (Firebase, AWS S3) or MongoDB GridFS

✅ PHASE 14: PWA Support & Offline Mode

Enable Progressive Web App functionality

Store-and-forward messages

Offline chat queuing

Service workers and local storage caching

✅ PHASE 15: Marketplace & Monetization Add-ons

Marketplace for:

Templates

Caption packs

Custom AI bots

Users can buy/sell digital assets

Admin earns commission on transactions
PHASE 16: Mobile App Deployment

Convert the React frontend into a mobile-ready app using React Native or Capacitor

Ensure full compatibility with backend APIs

Build Android and iOS versions (APK + IPA)

Add:

Mobile-optimized layouts

Splash screen and app icon

JWT token storage using AsyncStorage

Push notifications via Firebase or OneSignal

Prepare and submit apps to:

Google Play Store

Apple App Store

Provide all metadata: screenshots, privacy policy, description, etc.

🔁 Also Integrate These Recommended Enhancements:

📦 Infrastructure

WebSocket fallback (long polling)

Distributed chat sharding

Multi-region MongoDB support (replica sets)

Redis caching layer for real-time performance

🛡️ Advanced Security

2FA for creators and admins

IP/device-based alerts

Login/IP history logs

Admin session tracking with token/device fingerprint

🔧 Developer Tools

Plugin SDK for 3rd-party devs

Webhook support (moderation alerts, integrations)

API rate/usage dashboard

💰 Monetization Upgrades

Subscription tiers: Free, Pro, Enterprise

Coin-based tipping system

Affiliate/referral tools

In-app purchases (themes, bots, packs)

✅ PHASE 17: Modular Expansion & Scalability

Modular microservices architecture

Prepare Redis + MongoDB for sharding and replication

Server scaling (Docker, Kubernetes optional)

Admin broadcast system (send global updates/alerts)

Load-balanced deployment infrastructure

Auto-scaling setup on cloud (e.g., Vercel Functions or AWS Lambda)

Long-term: prepare for open-source SDK and public API developer portal
PHASE 18: Ultimate Privacy & DarkNet Readiness

Implement Tor routing compatibility for whistleblower-grade anonymity

Add stealth entry point for users with hidden login paths

Enable app disguise mode (e.g., fake calculator/notes UI)

Store zero metadata about users (no IP, no email, no device tracking)

Ensure full encryption of all messages both in transit and at rest

Integrate optional on-device encryption before transmission

Offer offline-only mode with delayed sync once secure network (VPN/Tor) is available

Obfuscate all requests using randomized patterns and dummy traffic if needed

This phase is critical to position Whisspra as a globally secure platform for journalists, whistleblowers, activists, and users in surveillance-heavy regions.

PHASE 19: Platform Branding & Administrative Structure

Define official brand color scheme:

Primary Color: Deep Midnight Blue #1A1B3F

Accent Color: Mint Green #B8F3D3

Enable full Admin Theme Control:

Upload/change logo

Update color palette, font, layout options

Enable runtime theme switching (light/dark/custom)

Preview theme updates before saving

Logo and app identity should reflect uploaded brand assets across all UI points (web, mobile, admin panel).

Company Department Configuration (via Admin Panel):

Trust & Safety – Manage moderation, reports, user safety tools

Infrastructure – Load balancing, server performance, uptime alerts

Security & Compliance – Legal/privacy management, GDPR/CCPA settings

Monetization – Creator income tools, tip analytics, fraud checks

Developer/API – Plugin SDK, API access control, webhook dashboards

These features ensure Whisspra is scalable not just as a secure product, but also as a fully branded and operational tech company.

✅ PHASE 20: User Analytics, Reporting & Feedback System
Purpose: Monitor user behavior, improve experience, and support data-driven decisions.

📊 Core Analytics Features:
Real-time dashboard showing:

Daily/weekly/monthly active users

Message traffic (sent/received/self-destructed)

Tip/transaction metrics

Whistleblower mode usage count

Retention tracking (new vs. returning users)

Engagement heatmaps (popular chat times)

Geolocation trends (optional and anonymized)

📥 Reporting & Feedback Tools:
In-app feedback submission (with screenshots)

Bug report system (auto-tag browser/device info)

Auto-send error reports on crash

Anonymous suggestions inbox

Feedback analytics dashboard for admin review

🔍 Admin Reports & Exports:
Downloadable reports (PDF/CSV)

Monthly performance summaries

Creator earnings report

Abuse report summaries for Trust & Safety

✅ PHASE 21: Group Media Sync – Watch Together Mode

Purpose: Add a unique and social media-rich feature that sets Whisspra apart from other messaging platforms.

🎬 Core Features:

Group playback of synced video (YouTube, Vimeo, direct URL)

Real-time play/pause/seek synchronization

Room host moderation (optional)

Private or public watch rooms

Text or video chat alongside playback

🔐 Privacy & Security:

Encrypted watch room tokens

Join via invitation or anonymous share links

Disguise or hide room entry via stealth mode (for whistleblower protection)

💰 Monetization Opportunities:

Premium co-watch rooms

Creator-hosted ticketed events

In-app tipping during watch

Sponsored screening sessions

This feature will position Whisspra as not only a chat platform, but a social experience hub — combining messaging, media, and community.

✅ PHASE 22: Real-Time Communication & AI Integration Expansion

Purpose: Equip Whisspra with next-generation interaction and personalization tools that no mainstream app offers in combination.

📞 Voice/Video Calling with Encryption:

Peer-to-peer audio/video chat using WebRTC

End-to-end encryption for both voice and video streams

Blur background and camera off modes

Group calls with screen share option

Emergency 'whistle mode' trigger during video for stealth alerts

🪪 Digital ID Verification:

Secure onboarding process for verified creators or businesses

Optional KYC (Know Your Customer) integration using services like Stripe Identity or Onfido

Badge system for verified profiles

Extra layer of protection against impersonation or scams

🎨 AI Avatar & Assistant:

AI-powered onboarding assistant to guide new users (chatbot style)

Avatar generation using uploaded selfies or anonymous avatars (AI-generated)

Daily content tips, safety reminders, or interactive setup helpers

Visual customization for UI themes based on mood or vibe

🔄 Cross-App Integration (Bridge Layer):

Optional bridge for forwarding messages from WhatsApp or Telegram to Whisspra

Unified inbox with message origin tag

Alerts for replies on external platforms

Privacy sandbox to avoid exposing metadata across platforms

These upgrades enable Whisspra to go beyond being a secure chat app — turning it into an intelligent, cross-network communication engine.

✅ PHASE 23: Whisspra Use Case Overview – Business & User Benefits

💼 For Businesses & Organizations:

Whisspra is designed to support creators, NGOs, brands, and secure teams.

Creator Tools: Tipping, premium content, co-watch rooms, fan support

Team Chat Rooms: End-to-end encrypted threads for sensitive collaboration

Admin Controls: Analytics, session tracking, abuse logs, moderation tools

Verified Profiles: Digital ID badge system with optional KYC

Custom Branding: Upload logo, set color themes, white-label ready

Webhooks & API: Developer SDK and automation support

Departments & Role Segmentation: Full internal operations panel (Trust, Infra, Compliance, etc.)

👥 For Individual Users:

Whisspra is built for privacy-conscious, creative, and social users:

Anonymous login — no phone or email required

Whistleblower Mode with disguised UI

Self-destructing messages + encryption

Avatar customization, chat themes, vibe-based UI

Movie watch-together rooms

Group video/audio calls

AI onboarding assistant

Creator discovery and tipping

🔐 Why Whisspra is Better:

Combines messaging + media + privacy + monetization

Built-in admin dashboard, analytics, developer tools

More secure than WhatsApp, more fun than Discord, more rewarding than Patreon

✅ PHASE 24: Stealth Conference Calling Feature

Purpose: Allow users to initiate secure group calls without revealing it is a conference to any participant.

📞 Stealth Conference Call Mode:

Invisible Group Dialing: Initiate multi-user voice call from one user interface, with each recipient seeing only a 1-on-1 call interface.

No Participant List Exposure: Users cannot see how many others are on the line.

Encrypted Multi-Bridge Handling: Server handles voice streams via secure bridge without disclosing overlap to other parties.

Caller Controls: The original initiator has mute/disconnect control over participants silently.

Panic Button Mode: Auto-disconnect or mute all on trigger.

🔒 Privacy & Ethics Consideration:

Feature restricted to verified users with secure justification (journalists, legal teams, whistleblowers).

In-app notice: "This feature may not be available to all users due to privacy policy and legal regulations in your country."

Optional logging (for audit or abuse prevention) can be enabled at admin level with user awareness.

💰 Monetization:

This feature is part of Whisspra's Pro or Enterprise subscription tiers.

Access is locked behind a premium purchase or subscription.

Admin panel includes:

Toggle to enable/disable stealth calling for specific users or roles

Purchase history tracking

Trial mode activation

This function reinforces Whisspra’s unique position in secure, ethical communication — ideal for investigations, journalism, and high-stakes private coordination.

✅ PHASE 25: Cognitive Room AI (C-Rooms)

Purpose: Introduce smart, AI-powered chat rooms that act like living knowledge hubs with memory, assistance, and collaboration tools — setting Whisspra apart as an intelligent communication ecosystem.

🧠 Core Capabilities:

Persistent Memory Log: Automatically summarize conversations, decisions, and shared resources.

AI Recap Assistant: Ask "What did we decide last week?" — the AI replies with summarized context.

Mood Tracker: Detect tone shifts (e.g., conflict, motivation) and alert moderators.

Auto Moderation: Suggest or apply topic/thread labels and flag off-topic or toxic messages.

Thread Organizer: Automatically group discussions into mini-threads based on topic.

📘 Built-in Commands:

/recap — Summarize recent activity.

/todo — Add a shared task or note to the group memory.

/highlight — Pin and log an important message.

/anonymous — Post disguised/anonymous input (if enabled).

🔐 Privacy & Control:

Room creators control memory and AI access scope.

Admin can disable AI access to sensitive discussions.

Activity audit logs for transparency.

💰 Monetization:

One free C-Room per user on Free Plan

Premium users unlock multiple C-Rooms with deeper memory and longer history

Optional AI personalities or co-pilot bots as paid add-ons

C-Rooms evolve Whisspra into a platform of intelligent collaboration, empowering communities, teams, creators, and causes with smart, privacy-first group intelligence.
✅ PHASE 26: Temporal Disguise Mode (TDM)

Purpose: Empower users to temporarily hide or disguise sensitive chats based on time, behavior, or phone actions — ideal for high-risk users.

⏳ Core Features:

Auto-Hide by Time: Schedule chats to disappear during set times (e.g. 7pm–7am).

Behavior-Based Triggers: Hide chats based on keywords (e.g., "urgent"), device tilt/gesture (face-down or shake).

Disguise Mode UI: Turn the chat UI into a fake app (calculator, notes, etc.). Unlock via password or biometric.

Stealth Alerts: No push notifications while hidden.

🔐 Security:

Local encrypted chat memory during hidden state.

Panic gesture: auto-erases or activates camouflage UI.

💰 Monetization:

One hidden chat allowed on free plan

Pro users unlock:

Unlimited disguised chats

Custom fake UIs

Advanced behavior triggers

TDM makes Whisspra an essential privacy tool for journalists, activists, and users in restrictive environments.

✅ PHASE 27: Live Voice Rooms with Spatial Audio & AI Transcription

Purpose: Enable immersive audio chat experiences with real-time captions and creator monetization.

🎧 Core Features:

Drop-in voice chat rooms (like Spaces)

Speaker/Listener roles

Spatial audio panning

AI-powered real-time transcription

Playback archive (audio + text)

🔐 Privacy & Admin Tools:

Room lock/password/invite

Recording consent popup

Watermarked replays

💰 Monetization:

Tip speakers

Host ticketed audio events

Offer replay downloads

Spatial voice + AI captions make Whisspra ideal for community engagement, storytelling, and secure audio discussion.

PHASE 29: Full Payment Gateway & Admin Earnings Panel

PHASE 30: Developer Control & Codebase Access Management.


 PHASE 31:Mesh Networking System for Offline Communication

Objective: Enable Whisspra to operate without the internet by leveraging Bluetooth and Wi-Fi Direct to send messages through peer-to-peer mesh networking.

🛰️ How It Works:

Integrate existing mesh SDKs:

Bridgefy for Bluetooth LE mesh

Briar or Nearby Connections API (Android)

Use local peer discovery and direct connections

Messages are relayed hop-to-hop until reaching the destination

Auto-store-and-forward for temporarily unreachable devices

🔐 Security:

Full end-to-end encryption over mesh

Intermediate nodes only act as relays

Device-level ephemeral storage

📱 UI Behavior:

New toggle: “Enable Offline Mesh Mode”

Status indicator: 🔵 Connected via Mesh

Queued message status: Sending... > Pending... > Delivered

💰 Monetization:

Free: 1-on-1 offline messaging

Pro:

Offline group chats

Voice message support

Priority delivery

AI-optimized routing

Mesh Mode allows Whisspra to stay functional in censorship zones, disaster zones, and high-security contexts — making it a true next-gen secure messenger.
PRO FEATURE ACCESS CONTROL (Universal Toggle Instruction)

For all features labeled as "Pro" or "Enterprise" in these instructions, implement the following behavior:

Add a centralized Feature Access Control System in the backend

Features are disabled by default and unlocked based on the user's subscription tier

Each feature must include a proOnly: true flag in its configuration

The frontend must dynamically check access status before displaying the feature

If a Pro feature is clicked by a free user:

Show a prompt to upgrade to Pro

Link to the pricing or subscription page

This applies to features such as:

Stealth Conference Call

AI Avatar Assistant

Offline Group Chat (Mesh Mode)

Cognitive Room AI (C-Rooms)

TDM (Temporal Disguise Mode)

Voice Rooms with Spatial Audio

Payment Management Panel

Developer Dashboard

This ensures monetization is enforced while preserving user experience and feature clarity.

📷 PHASE 32: Photo, Document, and Display Picture (DP) Upload Capability

Objective: Allow users to securely upload and exchange media such as images, documents, and videos inside chats and creator channels — and set profile display pictures (DPs).

🗂️ Features:

Upload and preview:

JPEG, PNG, MP4, PDF, DOCX

Inline previews for image/video files

Document viewer for common formats (PDF, DOCX)

Media gallery inside each chat thread

Upload and update user profile display pictures (DPs)

Creator avatars and profile customization

🔐 Privacy & Storage:

Files encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest

Files stored using cloud storage (e.g., AWS S3, Cloudinary, Firebase)

Set time-to-live (TTL) on shared files

Admin setting to limit file size or types

Profile pictures can be hidden or made visible only to contacts

🚦Access:

All users can upload DPs from settings or onboarding

Creators and admins have custom branding options

Admins can delete or moderate uploaded files and avatars

This makes Whisspra ready for both personal identity and branded professional presence.

🎓 PHASE 32: Whisspra EDU Mode – Tools for Students & Academic Users

Objective: Introduce a dedicated student and academic environment in Whisspra for collaboration, productivity, and community building.

🧠 Core Features:

WhisspraGPT AI Study Assistant: Personalized AI to help with summaries, notes, questions, and explanations.

Classroom Audio Channels: Real-time audio rooms for classes and group study.

Community Lounge (formerly Clubs & Societies Hub): Discover or join academic and social communities.

Flashcard Builder + Quiz Mode: Create flashcards, challenge friends, and share decks.

Study Planner + Deadline Tracker: Organize tasks with calendar-linked smart reminders.

Campus Noticeboard (WhisspraBoard): Announcement board for events, news, and updates.

Resource Exchange: Share or request notes, books, past exams, and tools.

Lecture Replay Room: Upload/view recorded sessions (for school-affiliated groups).

🎓 Academic Profile + Feed:

Users define academic status, subjects, and institution

Smart feed shows custom events, groups, and resources

Optional school verification (e.g. .edu email or uploaded ID)

💰 Monetization:

Premium EDU features like collaborative flashcards, WhisspraGPT+, and smart reminders

Institution packages for full feature deployment in schools or campuses
